name: school-mcp
description: MCP server exposing Argo didUP school data (homework, grades, lesson topics, notices) to Claude

scripts.setup: npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run setup:argo && npm run build
scripts.setup:argo: cd node_modules/portaleargo-api && npm install --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund --legacy-peer-deps && (npm run build || true) && test -f dist/index.js && test -f dist/types/apiTypes.d.ts
